summary: Deep code audit of all 54 source files across 13 crates. Found 16 security findings: 2 Critical (vault key not zeroized, prompt injection to tool execution), 4 High (bot token in URLs, username allowlist bypass, API key in Debug/Serialize, sandbox declaration-only validation), 6 Medium (LIKE injection, best-effort file permissions, /tmp fallback workspace, no TLS enforcement, unauthenticated status endpoint, unbounded sessions), 4 Low (unbounded env var expansion, non-atomic vault writes, StoredSecret Debug derive, bot token in memory). Zero unsafe blocks found. All SQL queries properly parameterized. All 4 STRIDE predictions confirmed in code. Dependency audit: 559 packages, no known CVEs in locked versions, 1 deprecated crate (serde_yaml), missing zeroize dependency.
